signUp.title: Dang ky
signUp.phonePlaceholder: Nhap so dien thoai cua ban
signUp.agreePrefix: Khi dang ky, toi dong y voi

forgotPassword.title: Quen mat khau
forgotPassword.description: Nhap email cua ban de nhan huong dan dat lai mat khau.

forgotPassword.successMessage: Neu tai khoan ton tai voi email nay, huong dan dat lai mat khau da duoc gui.
